title: ValueAggregatorMapper.java
description: This Java file defines a generic mapper for Apache Hadoop's ValueAggregator. It extends the Mapper class from the MapReduce framework, processing key-value pairs and generating aggregation ID/value pairs. The core logic revolves around the 'map' function, iterating through a list of value aggregator descriptors to emit key-value pairs. It takes key-value pairs and a Context object as inputs, and emits Text type key-value pairs as outputs. Dependencies include Hadoop's core classes and ValueAggregatorJobBase for setup functionality.
